hero.title: Kukatuka ku usongwelo wa kutwama ku mikanda ya kuyula ya mbunga
hero.lead: IATF yakukwasa yikungululo, ni atu eswe hanga apwe ni yipikalo yipema ya kuwana mikanda.
support: Milimo yize akutayiza yinasoloka mu chizavu cha GitHub cha IATF ku mukunda wa chilolezo cha copyleft, nawa yinasolola ku mbunga kuli injinia yoze wakutayiza.

header.title: Jila yipema ya software yize atu mahasa kutambula

paragraphs: Mutu mweswe mahasa kuhana mulonga ku IATF ku mukunda wa formulaire.

Chishina cheswe chize akutayiza chakupwa ni chihela cha atu eswe chize chakwata ha code, yuma, mikanda, ni yikuma yize akulita, ni chitukuko chize chakusongwela kuli injinia yoze wakwata mulimo wacho.

terms.definition: Kulita ni mulimo wa mulimo wacho ni kupwa cha mulimo wacho
Chitanda cha GitHub cha atu eswe

header.title: Kuchi yakulingiwa
header.intro: Muvwimbimbi kana wapwa wamundende chikuma, ngocho kachapwa chachikalu kulondezeza jila yize vatu veji kuzachisanga.

steps.title: Yuma yize anafupila
paragraphs: Chizavu, chizavu cha atu, hanji mutu ni mutu mahasa kuhana chihula chize chili ni ushindakenyo umuwika.
Yipikalo muyihasa kuputuka ha site, ha email kuli: contact@iatf.cc, hanji ku yitanga ya Discord.

steps.title: IATF yakutuhengwola
paragraphs: Twakutayiza mulimo wacho, ni yize muuhasa kulinga, ni kunyingika nyi mulimo wacho uli mu mulimo wa atu eswe.

steps.title: Kutachika chijimbikilo cha atu eswe
paragraphs: Nyi umwe mulimo muwatambula, muwasoneka mu ululikiso wa GitHub wa IATF ku mukunda wa chilolezo cha copyleft.
Chizuvo chacho chinapu chizuvo cha mbunga, yikuma, ni mikanda.

steps.title: Injinia yoze watwama ni usongwelo kakusongwela mulimo wacho
paragraphs: Mutu yoze wakulipika ni mulimo wacho kakuwahisa ha chihela cha mulimo wacho, nawa mulimo wacho wakuwahisa unalingiwa ha mbunga ya atu.

header.title: Kuhehwojola milimo yize uli nayo hanji kuputuka mulimo umuwika

paragraphs: Zachisa lijililo hanga unyingike yuma yize yili ya mbunga, hanji uputuke ni kuhengwojola nyi upikalo umuwika unateli kupwa mulimo.
